---
name: Eddie Recipe Request
about: Request a new recipe in eddie-recipes (or promote a recipe to eddie-web-components)
title: "[Recipe] "
labels: recipe-request
assignees: ''
---

## What pattern is needed

_Describe the UI pattern that doesn't exist in Eddie yet. Include a screenshot or sketch if helpful._

## Where it's needed

_Which BFW project is blocked on this? Link the repo or PR._

## Why it's not covered by existing components

_Which Eddie Web Components did you check? Why don't they cover this case?_

## Proposed API

_What would this recipe's HTML/JS surface look like? What props/slots/events does it need?_

## Should this graduate to core?

- [ ] This is project-specific → stays in `eddie-recipes`
- [ ] This is reusable across many BFW projects → consider promoting to `eddie-web-components`

## Related

_Link any related issues, prior discussions, or design files._
